name: Text Scaling
description: A readability setting that scales text and related UI layout while preserving interaction targets, localization, safe areas, and overflow behavior.
design_notes: Text scaling is a layout system, not just a larger font. Define text_scale_multiplier, minimum hit targets, reflow behavior, safe area constraints, localization expansion, subtitle and HUD scopes, and live preview. Every screen that displays critical information needs an overflow strategy before large text ships.
design_purpose: Make text-heavy UI, subtitles, prompts, inventories, and journals readable at different distances and display sizes.
Prevent larger text from breaking layouts, hiding controls, or truncating localized strings.
Support accessibility profiles that persist readability choices across sessions and devices.
player_fantasy: The player feels able to read the game comfortably without leaning in, guessing, or sacrificing navigation.

parameters.name: text_scale_multiplier
parameters.description: Multiplier applied to eligible text styles in the selected UI scope.

parameters.name: layout_reflow_policy_id
parameters.description: Rule used when scaled text exceeds the original container.

parameters.name: minimum_hit_target_units
parameters.description: Minimum interactive target size after text and layout changes.

parameters.name: localization_expansion_factor
parameters.description: Reserved layout growth factor for longer localized strings.

parameters.name: subtitle_profile_id
parameters.description: Subtitle style profile affected by text scaling.

parameters.name: safe_area_margin_units
parameters.description: Margin preserved around screen edges and device cutouts.

edge_cases: Long localized strings at maximum scale need wrapping, scrolling, or pagination without hiding confirm buttons.
Split-screen and handheld modes can require different profile scopes from desktop or living-room displays.
Timed dialogue, tutorials, or captions must remain readable long enough after scaling changes.
User interface safe areas can shrink available space after platform overlays or device rotation.
common_bugs: Text increases but button hit boxes and focus rectangles keep the old dimensions.
Scaled subtitles overlap speaker labels, letterbox bars, or critical HUD warnings.
Layout reflow works in English but clips languages with longer words or different line breaking.
Settings preview uses a sample paragraph but real inventory, quest, and dialogue screens ignore the multiplier.
balancing_notes: Large text should not be treated as a gameplay advantage; design dense HUDs to reflow rather than hide information.
Scaling critical prompts may require reducing noncritical decorative text to preserve screen clarity.
Readable text improves usability for many players, including small screens and couch-distance play.
accessibility_notes: Offer live preview and reset controls, and apply changes without requiring restart when possible.
Pair text scaling with contrast, background opacity, and subtitle speaker label settings for real readability.

implementation_notes.unity: Use style tokens or TextMeshPro/UIToolkit variables rather than per-widget font sizes. Layout containers should reflow, scroll, or paginate based on layout_reflow_policy_id, and automated UI tests should cover maximum scale plus long localized strings.
implementation_notes.godot: Apply text_scale_multiplier through theme overrides and container layouts. Keep minimum hit target rules in reusable UI components so buttons, list rows, and dialogue choices grow with text.
implementation_notes.unreal: Use UMG style data, DPI scaling, and invalidation-safe layout containers. Subtitle, menu, HUD, and journal widgets should consume the same profile setting and respect platform safe areas.
implementation_notes.web: Use CSS custom properties for text scale, rem-based spacing, and container queries. Validate Canvas overlays, DOM UI, and WebGL labels at maximum scale with localization expansion samples.

example_games.title: The Last of Us Part II
example_games.note: Includes extensive text, subtitle, and UI readability options.

example_games.title: God of War Ragnarök
example_games.note: Includes text size and readability accessibility settings.
